---
name: Skill Request
about: Request a new skill to be added
title: '[SKILL] '
labels: skill-request
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Name

Proposed name for the skill.

## Purpose

What would this skill do? What problem does it solve?

## Use Cases

Describe 2-3 realistic scenarios where this skill would be useful:

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Example Prompts

What prompts should trigger this skill?

```
"example prompt 1"
"example prompt 2"
"example prompt 3"
```

## Expected Output

What should the skill produce or help with?

## Technology Stack

What technologies, frameworks, or tools would this skill work with?

- 
- 
- 

## Similar Skills

Are there any existing skills that are similar? How would this be different?

## Priority

How important is this skill to you?

- [ ] Critical - I need this for my work
- [ ] High - Would be very useful
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Just an idea

## Would You Like to Contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can help build this skill
- [ ] Yes, I can help test this skill
- [ ] No, just requesting
- [ ] Maybe, need guidance

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or resources about the skill request.
